caption: A man wearing a grey, tall-tufted wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones speaks into a microphone. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red and white patterned bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in a room that resembles a clothing store or a studio, with white shirts and other garments hanging in the background, alongside framed photographs on the wall. A black microphone is positioned in front of him on the left side of the frame. The "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" logo appears twice on the screen: once on the left side and once on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing across the frames.
